title: Explanatory Video News EVANGELION 20
wikitext:
[]: Explanatory Video News EVANGELION 2.0             Quote Post by Gaudy » Fri May 29, 2009 11:27 pm I maked a video explaining the news of Evangelion 2.0. I did it a month ago Maybe the news are a little old, and my english is so poor >.<, but I did the best I could. I hope the fans like it News Evangelion 2.0 [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Aup1QeRvBpQ[/url][/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Kazi » Sat May 30, 2009 11:26 pm I hadn't seen the full Pachinko ad, that was pretty interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun May 31, 2009 12:32 am speaking of which, i found a video of kaworu kicking multiple angel buts Using the lance that much should be considered cheating

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun May 31, 2009 12:47 am Muhahahaha!!!!!! Every time that EPIC MUSIC started and Kaworu appeared I cracked the hell up! That games looks so goofy. Good ruck.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun May 31, 2009 10:42 am Axell wrote: speaking of which, i found a video of kaworu kicking multiple angel buts Using the lance that much should be considered cheating

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun May 31, 2009 3:46 pm The funniest thing is that Kaworu uses the same copula as Tsuruya. なのさ.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 31, 2009 7:47 pm Those pachinko games are so ghetto. And Kaworu is a little too nonchalant about infanticide. @Gendo'sPapa: The music is "Dies Irae" from Verdi's Requiem, if you're curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sun Jun 07, 2009 10:01 pm I saw your video, Gaudy. It would be quite interesting if we saw actual shots of Eva-04 This time around

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jun 13, 2009 10:31 pm That would be nice^^^ but I doubt we will.If anything,we'll see a very short scene with Unit 04 before the place explodes.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 13, 2009 11:03 pm I feel like I'm being bombarded by spanish, subtitles, music, and images. Too much!
